reflections.reflection: The execution failed to achieve the objective of multimodal scene understanding coordination and verification. All 13 reported issues consistently indicate that critical auditory fields—'主体声音内容' (main audio content) and '主体声音风格' (main audio style)—are missing across multiple scenes (Scenes 0, 1, 3, 5–7, 9–11, 14–17). This reflects a systemic omission rather than isolated errors, suggesting the verification process did not enforce mandatory multimodal field completion.
reflections.improvement: Implement an automated pre-validation gate that halts submission unless every scene contains both '主体声音内容' and '主体声音风格' alongside any visual fields. Integrate this check into the workflow as a mandatory step prior to verification, with explicit error highlighting for incomplete scenes.
